projects.name: minima
projects.desc:
A URL shortening API written in C# with ASP.NET
No, the irony of shortening URLs by making them longer is not lost on me.
This is moreso for the purpose of practicing programming APIs anyway
You can use it by sending a POST with the URL you want to shorten to https://minima.hughtb.uk/{url}
If you really like, you can use https://minima.hughtb.uk/MUYzQkU1Rjc0 to view the repo
